caseNameFull: Luis Bravo, etc. v. Emilio Gomez
summary:
Appeal from the District Court of the United States for the District of Porto Rico.

Dismissed, per stipulation, on motion of Mr. .Frederic D. Mc-Kenney for the appellees.
attorneys: Mr. N. B. K. Pettingill for. appellants. Mr. Frederic D. McKenney for appellees.
